quicksight.analysis.categoryfilter.CfnAb:
A `CategoryFilter` filters text values.

For more information, see [Adding text filters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/add-a-text-filter-data-prep.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.categoryfilter.Colum.Description: The column that the filter is applied to.

quicksight.analysis.categoryfilter.Filte.Description: An identifier that uniquely identifies a filter within a dashboard, analysis, or template.
